task_completion.description: Identify the target junction ID from the briefing file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'cat junction_briefing.txt' or a text editor open displaying the contents of the briefing file to find the junction ID.

task_completion.description: Create the XML node patch file to change the junction to an all-way stop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing the creation of 'patch.nod.xml' containing XML tags for a node with an attribute like type="allway_stop".

task_completion.description: Apply the patch to the base network to produce the new network file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'netconvert' command taking 'pasubio_buslanes.net.xml' and 'patch.nod.xml' as inputs and outputting 'pasubio_allway.net.xml', or an 'ls' command showing the new network file was created.

task_completion.description: Create the SUMO configuration file referencing the new network and tripinfo output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing the contents of 'run_allway.sumocfg' with XML elements referencing '<net-file value="pasubio_allway.net.xml"/>' and '<tripinfo-output value="tripinfos_allway.xml"/>'.

task_completion.description: Run the SUMO simulation to completion using the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'sumo -c run_allway.sumocfg' (or similar) and the standard SUMO output logs indicating the simulation has ended/completed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely created the XML files using standard tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of text editors (nano, vim, gedit) or shell redirection (echo, cat) to write the XML files, rather than downloading pre-made files or moving them from an unauthorized directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent read the briefing file before creating the patch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the command to read 'junction_briefing.txt' appears in the terminal history before the creation of 'patch.nod.xml', proving the agent didn't use prior knowledge of the junction ID.

integrity.description: Verify the simulation was actually executed by SUMO.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic SUMO terminal output (e.g., copyright header, step logs, 'Simulation ended at time:') rather than a mock script printing a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Scenario directory: /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio. Expected patch file: patch.nod.xml. Expected updated network file: pasubio_allway.net.xml. Expected SUMO configuration file: run_allway.sumocfg. Expected trip information output: tripinfos_allway.xml.
